title: Certains comparisons between UUID produce a MAL error
poc: CREATE TABLE some_table (uuid_a UUID, uuid_b UUID);
SELECT * FROM some_table WHERE uuid_a <> uuid_b;
SELECT * FROM some_table WHERE uuid_a = uuid_b;
SELECT * FROM some_table WHERE NOT (uuid_a = uuid_b);
SELECT * FROM some_table WHERE NOT (uuid_a = uuid_b AND TRUE);
key_bug_features: Comparisons between UUIDs produce MAL error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, uuid_col UUID NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(255));
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE NOT (uuid_col = UUID('123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174001') AND name IS NOT NULL);
